global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: New benchmark tracks 'agent aging' in long-running AI systems, showing up to 67% performance drops from memory issues; memory architecture can create 4.5x differences in reliability over hundreds of interactions, shifting focus from raw model intelligence to long-term stability.

Framework for agents to improve via domain-specific predictions with full reasoning chains; agents learn from real-world resolutions by updating memory and calibration, allowing transfer of high-quality reasoning patterns between agents for measurable long-term performance tracking.

Beyond basic chat history or RAG, effective agent memory combines vector, relational, and graph databases with retrieval layers; enterprises use this for scalable, persistent long-term recall in production agents.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Operational layer for governing, orchestrating, and tracking agent actions in multi-chain environments (Solana, Base, etc.).
near_misses.reason: Primarily crypto/blockchain focused rather than core AI technical innovation.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Clearing and settlement protocol for agent commerce with decentralized AI inference.
near_misses.reason: Heavily tied to crypto agent economy and payments, not general AI frameworks or memory techniques.
